This is Mike from Reliable Plumbing in Tempe. We mostly do residential. Drain clearing is our bread and butter — snakes and hydro jetting. We also do water heater installs, both tank and tankless, and full repipes for older homes. A drain clearing is usually $175, water heaters depend on the unit but labor is about $500 for a standard tank install. Repipes we bid custom. I run the trucks myself plus I've got two guys, Javier and Sam, and my wife Linda answers the phones. We're Monday through Saturday, 7 to 4.
